## PatternConstraintNode interface

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

String pattern constraint (ECMA-262 regex without delimiters).

Multiple `pattern` constraints on the same field compose via intersection: all patterns must match simultaneously.

Type applicability: requires `PrimitiveTypeNode("string")`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PatternConstraintNode 
```
